steps: Go to https://heapanalytics.com and log in to your account
Navigate to Account → Manage → Privacy & Security
Copy your API Key displayed on that page

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Heap server-side API key, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: The API key is found under Administration → Account → Manage → Privacy & Security → Use the API tab
Heap uses a separate App ID for client-side tracking; the API key is only for server-side calls
Rate limits apply per workspace; contact Heap support for details
Heap is a paid product; API access requires an active subscription
